# SMOKE — Write. Run. Know.
> Syntax-checks and sandbox-executes JS, TS, and Python code before writes are allowed, catching bugs immediately.

## Core Files
- [src/main.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/main.rs): CLI Entrypoint and CLI subcommand routing.
- [src/hook/mod.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/hook/mod.rs): PreToolUse hook intercepting Claude Code write/edit tool calls.
- [src/post_hook/mod.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/post_hook/mod.rs): PostToolUse hook finding and executing co-located tests after successful writes.
- [src/mcp/mod.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/mcp/mod.rs): stdio Model Context Protocol (MCP) server handler exposing the `smoke_verify` tool.
- [src/sandbox/](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/sandbox): Core sandboxes (V8/deno_core for JS/TS, subprocess + rlimit + seccomp for Python).
- [src/parser/mod.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/parser/mod.rs): Tree-sitter parsing, standalone file analysis, and writing-side duplicate checks.
- [src/state/mod.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/state/mod.rs): Session-scoped, file-backed loop and repeated-failure detection state.
- [src/config/mod.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/config/mod.rs): Layered configuration loading and merging.
- [src/install/mod.rs](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/src/install/mod.rs): Indempotent auto-installer for tool settings.

## Documentation
- [docs/TERMINAL-AIS.md](file:///Users/sayansenapati/Desktop/Dev/Innovation/smoke/docs/TERMINAL-AIS.md): Integration guide for terminal and editor AIs (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Cline/Roo Code, Aider, etc.).

## Key Concepts
- **Advisor Mode**: Default mode. Prints warnings to the terminal and returns them in Claude Code's `additionalContext` without blocking.
- **Strict Mode**: Blocks writes (exits with code 2) on syntax or sandbox execution errors only when the file is identified as a standalone runnable program.
- **Silent Mode**: Allows all writes silently without running any checks.
- **Loop / Repeated-Failure Detection**: Scoped per Claude Code `session_id`, normalized failure signatures are stored in `~/.smoke/state/<session_id>.json` to warn or escalate when loops are detected.
- **Fail-Open Policy**: Any internal error (disk I/O, parsing, disabled engines) defaults to allowing the write with zero blocking.
